get.description:
Fetch product review data for merchant with specified merchantUrlName

Use the query parameters to make the query more specific. Use fridge to filter only for specific fridges. It's also possible to use the from and to parameters to specify a custom date and time range (defaults to just yesterday).

parameters.name: merchantUrlName
parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

parameters.name: fridge
parameters.description: Filter on one or more specific fridges

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Set specific start date to filter the report on, defaults to yesterday.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Set specific end date to filter the report on, defaults to today.

get.description:
Fetch purchase data for merchant with specified merchantUrlName

Use the query parameters to make the query more specific. Use fridge to filter only for specific fridges. Use the from and to parameters to specify a custom date and time range (defaults to just yesterday). Finally, use includePaymentStatus and excludePaymentStatus to include or exclude specific payments statuses for purchases Only one of include or exclude parameters can be used, not both. NEW and PROCESSING payment statuses are excluded by default when no filters are specified.

parameters.name: merchantUrlName
parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

parameters.name: fridge
parameters.description: Filter on one or more specific fridges

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Set specific start date to filter the report on, defaults to yesterday.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Set specific end date to filter the report on, defaults to today.

parameters.name: includePaymentStatus
parameters.description: Only include purchases with specified payment statuses

parameters.name: excludePaymentStatus
parameters.description: Exclude specified payment statuses from the result

get.description: Fetch all data for the receipt of the purchase with specified reference

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: The unique reference for this purchase. Either the purchase ID, the Adyen PSP reference, or the short ID as seen on the shopper's bankstatement.

get.description:
Fetch restock data for merchant with specified merchantUrlName

Use the query parameters to make the query more specific. Use fridge to filter only for specific fridges. It's also possible to use the from and to parameters to specify a custom date and time range (defaults to just yesterday).

parameters.name: merchantUrlName
parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

parameters.name: fridge
parameters.description: Filter on one or more specific fridges

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Set specific start date to filter the report on, defaults to yesterday.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Set specific end date to filter the report on, defaults to today.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Only include items with specified statuses

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Only include items with specified actions

get.description:
Fetch current stock data for merchant with specified merchantUrlName

By default, this endpoint will return all fridges with a LIVE status. However, the fridge query parameter can be used to fetch one or more specific fridges of any status.

This report is based on a combination of Restock data and Purchase data, so it might not reflect exactly what is physically in the fridge. For example, turning off the fridge and then removing/adding products will cause the report to be inaccurate.

parameters.name: merchantUrlName
parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

parameters.name: fridge
parameters.description: Filter on one or more specific fridges

parameters.name: merchantUrlName
parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

parameters.name: emailAddress
parameters.description: Filter on one or more specific email addresses

put.description:
Modify an existing user

The request body should provide all properties; existing values will be replaced with null (or deleted) if not provided.

parameters.name: merchantUrlName
parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

post.description:
Create a new user with specified email address and optionally specified roles. The
user will receive an email with an invite link to finish the sign up process. This endpoint
can be called again to resend the invite link as long as the user has not completed the signup
process.

parameters.name: merchantUrlName
parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

patch.description:
Modify an existing user

The request body should provide the properties you want to change; only properties that are provided will be updated. The emailAddress property is required.

parameters.name: merchantUrlName
parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

delete.description: Delete a user with specified emailAddress. The user will be completely anonimised for all data linked to this user, like purchases. Deleting the user through this endpoint is only possible if the account is not associated with other merchants. Otherwise, the user must delete the account themselves through the app or https://home.intelligentfridges.com/api/appforward/account-deletion?merchant=[merchantUrlName] (replace [merchantUrlName] with your merchant name)

parameters.description: Merchant name <small>(lowercase, and spaces replaced by dashes)</small>

parameters.description: The user email address

productCategory.description: The name of the product category that the product type belongs to

productPackage.description: The name of the product package that the product type belongs to

productDeposit.description: The name of the product deposit that the product type belongs to

expiryDays.description: The amount of days after which this product will expire, starting from the moment of stocking in the fridge

currencyCode.description: The currency code of the merchant

price.description: The price of the product type, including surcharges in minor units

priceExSurcharges.description: The price of the product type, excluding surcharges, in minor units

vat.description: The VAT amount for the product type, as a percentage

thumbnailUrl.description: A URL to the thumbnail image of the product type

productBrand.description: The brand name of the product

productCategory.description: The brand name of the product

expiryDate.description: The expiry date of the product

price.description: The price of the product, including potential discounts, product package, and product deposit, in minor units

originalPrice.description: The original price of the product, including product package and product deposit, excluding discounts, in minor units

originalPriceExSurcharges.description: The original price of the product, excluding discounts, product package, and product deposit, in minor units

vat.description: The vat percentage of the product

discounts.description: A list of discounts that were applied to the product

refundStatus.description: A list of refund statuses of the product over time

productPackageName.description: The name of the product package

productPackageVat.description: The VAT amount the product package

productDepositName.description: The name of the product deposit

paidAmount.description: The amount that was actually deducted from the original price of the product, in minor units

provider.description: The name of the provider (facility) of the discount

amountType.description: Whether the configured discount amount is a percentage or a fixed value

ProductDiscount.description: A list of discounts that were applied to the product

date.description: The date that the status was applied

ProductRefundStatus.description: A list of refund statuses of the product over time

id.description: A unique identifier of the purchase

reportingDate.description: The date that the purchase was synchronised to the cloud from the fridge

purchaseDate.description: The date that the purchase was done on the fridge

type.description: The type of purchase, either through the app (ONLINE) or the payment terminal (POS)

userEmailAddress.description: The email address of the shopper (only with type=ONLINE)

paymentProcessor.description: The payment processor of the purchase

transactionReference.description: The unique identifier that is used to track all payment processing information. Can be empty when payment processing is not applicable (i.e. with 100% discount)

pspReference.description: The unqiue identifier that is used by Adyen to track API calls for the current payment status update. This ID can be used by Support to identify specific API calls on the Adyen platform.

amount.description: The total amount of the purchase, in minor units

reservationAmount.description: The amount reserved on the account of the shopper when starting a purchase through POS, in minor units

unrecognisedProducts.description: The unrecognised products, i.e. tags that can't be matched to any product type

purchaseStatus.description: A list of purchase statuses of the purchase over time

facility.description: The name of the facility where this fridge resides

reference.description: A custom reference, meant for API linking

serialNumber.description: The serial number of the cabinet of this fridge
